message:
fix: use shell check for CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN instead of secrets context

secrets.* cannot be used in step if: conditions directly.
Use shell-level check to conditionally skip publish when token is not set.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -152,7 +152,11 @@ jobs:
         with:
           toolchain: nightly
       - name: Publish to crates.io
-        if: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN != '' }}
         env:
           CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN: ${{ secrets.CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN }}
-        run: cargo publish --all-features
+        run: |
+          if [ -n "$CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN" ]; then
+            cargo publish --all-features
+          else
+            echo "CARGO_REGISTRY_TOKEN not set, skipping crates.io publish"
+          fi
